data.title: As a DSO orchestrator, implementation sub-agents dispatch with worktree isolation
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update sprint, debug-everything, and fix-bug to dispatch implementation sub-agents with isolation:worktree. Add worktree.isolation_enabled config key with shared-directory fallback.
**Why**: This is the dispatch-side change that gives each sub-agent its own working directory
**Scope**:
- IN: Dispatch changes in sprint/SKILL.md, debug-everything/SKILL.md, fix-bug/SKILL.md; worktree.isolation_enabled config key (default:true); verification step (sub-agent confirms different git root); sub-agent prompt explicitly prohibits committing
- OUT: Review/commit/merge logic (Story 4), conflict detection (Story 5)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, sprint dispatches implementation sub-agents with isolation:worktree when worktree.isolation_enabled is true
  ← Satisfies: "Orchestration skills dispatch implementation sub-agents with isolation: worktree"
- When this story is complete, debug-everything and fix-bug also dispatch with isolation:worktree when config enabled
  ← Satisfies: "Orchestration skills dispatch implementation sub-agents with isolation: worktree"
- When this story is complete, sub-agent dispatch prompt explicitly prohibits committing, running /dso:commit, or raw git commit — sub-agents implement only and return
  ← Satisfies: "Orchestration skills dispatch implementation sub-agents"
- When this story is complete, worktree.isolation_enabled=false produces shared-directory dispatch (existing behavior)
  ← Satisfies: "worktree.isolation_enabled config key; when disabled, fallback to shared-directory mode"
- When this story is complete, sub-agent confirms different git root as first action (verification step)
  ← Satisfies: "verified by sub-agent confirming git rev-parse --show-toplevel differs"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new logic
  ← Satisfies: TDD DoD

## Considerations

- [Reliability] CI/shallow clones may not support worktrees — config fallback handles this
- [Reliability] agent-batch-lifecycle.sh pre-check assumes shared working tree (git status, file-overlap) — document that these utilities are valid for session branch only, not worktree branches
- [Testing] Existing 40 sub-agent guard tests must still pass after Story 2's changes
- [Reliability] Sub-agent prompt must clearly state: implement only, do not commit, do not run /dso:commit

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence in your understanding of the work, approach, or intent. "High confidence" means clear evidence from the codebase or ticket context — not inference or reasonable assumption. When in doubt, stop and ask rather than guess.
